name: Ghost hunter enters your territory
description:
A ghost hunter enters the place you're haunting.

I tried to make this one as customizable as possible, right down to never specifying the location this takes place in. Because of this, please remember to implicate the location you're in inside the first message or, better yet, put it in chat memory.
(Yes, this means you can have this take place in a certain pizza restaurant. We all know which one i'm talking about.)

You can take this in pretty much any direction you want, there is no set story here. There isn't much about {{user}} in the personality text or scenario, so you could take this in a monster pov direction, but i'm not saying it's recommended.
Additional tags: Monsterpov, monsteruser, monster user, ghost, spirit, valentines day, possession, ghost hunter, paranormal investigator, fnaf (Hor hor hor hor hor)
creator: Mtga
